_note: PVC -> mount -> write -> restart -> persist, then the Block PVC challenge. PVCs omit storageClassName so the cluster default class binds. Two CRC-specific realities are handled so the run is green on CRC AND faithful to DCS: (1) the default class is WaitForFirstConsumer, so the PVC binds only after the consumer Pod is deployed — deploy first, then check Bound; (2) CRC's portless session SCC is RunAsAny (no auto fsGroup), so a non-root write to /data fails — we patch a fsGroup here (real DCS restricted-v2 assigns an in-range fsGroup automatically, so the workshop manifest stays portable and carries no fsGroup).

steps.run: envsubst < hello-dcs-with-volume.yaml | oc apply -f - && oc patch deployment/hello-dcs --type=json -p '[{"op":"add","path":"/spec/template/spec/containers/0/imagePullPolicy","value":"Always"}]' && oc patch deployment/hello-dcs --type=merge -p '{"spec":{"template":{"spec":{"securityContext":{"fsGroup":1001}}}}}' && oc rollout status deploy/hello-dcs --timeout=150s
oc rollout restart deploy/hello-dcs && oc rollout status deploy/hello-dcs --timeout=120s
